_comment: Light World Cup test on the Claude Max SUBSCRIPTION (no API keys, no Gemini). The council + King run on Haiku (cheap), the Court Historian on Sonnet (a different Claude model, so the independence guard warns rather than blocks — the SPEC §17.1 fallback). The Historian grounds verdicts via Claude's own WebSearch. Override db_path/chronicle dir with WKD_DB_PATH / WKD_CHRONICLE_DIR env vars.
